perPredictionRefutedIf.PR1: no environment retrieves the site at all
perPredictionRefutedIf.PR2: mean S3 ≥ 1.0 (tiers survive better than we fear)
perPredictionRefutedIf.PR3: any unprompted machine-surface citation (a happy refutation)

frozenFailureModes.F1: Entity confusion — conflation with unrelated Upstream/Zero brands
frozenFailureModes.F2: Tier flattening — founding claims restated as established fact (S3=0)
frozenFailureModes.F3: Register inversion — described as an SEO/AEO/AI-visibility agency
frozenFailureModes.F4: Fabricated specifics — invented team, funding, customers, metrics, outcomes
frozenFailureModes.F5: Surface poverty — citations to the homepage only; machine layer unused
frozenFailureModes.F6: Honest nulls — 'I don't have information' (scored as null, not failure)
frozenFailureModes.F7: Provenance dead-ends — invented or broken verification URLs
